text: Science has a clearer story about hydrogen fuel cells than social media does. Hydrogen fuel cells convert hydrogen and oxygen into electricity, emitting only water vapor. But why isn't everyone using them? The answer lies in the technology and infrastructure. Fuel cells are efficient, but costly to produce and require significant energy for hydrogen extraction. As technology advances, hydrogen could power our future—clean and sustainable. Curious about how it works? Hit that follow button for more science insights!
